SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF ANDREW SCHEUR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JS CREATIVE LIVING LLC IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS LIAMA D ALESSANDRO. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHEUR, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JS CREATIVE LIVING LLC $595.00 PRINCIPAL, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $704.00, $300 REIMBURSEMENT FOR DEDUCTION FOR PAINTING, $295 REIMBURSEMENT FOR CLEANING DEDUCTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
